memory:memory/2026-04-20.md:1:3.snippet: - Fixed recurring `summarize.sh`/`npx @steipete/summarize` failures: root-owned files in `~/.npm` cache were causing npm cache/cacache permission errors after earlier sudo/npm usage. Durable fix was `sudo chown -R lode:staff ~/.npm` followed by `npm cache verify`; summarize now works again. - Created and then updated the health note for YouTube video `https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=EfKVra2fofo` after summarize recovered; initial fallback used YouTube metadata due summarize failure, then note was refreshed with real summarize output.
